name: BTECH Corp
business: BTECH Corp is a blank check company formed to pursue an initial business combination, prioritizing targets in the oil and gas sector including upstream, midstream, and downstream activities. It also plans to explore opportunities in energy transition technologies, AI applications in energy, and data center power demand.

exposures.sentence: Although we may pursue an initial business combination in any business or industry, we intend to prioritize prospective targets in the oil and gas sector, including upstream (exploration and production), midstream (transportation, storage, gathering, and logistics), and downstream (refining, processing, marketing, and distribution) activities.

we also plan on exploring opportunities in related areas such as energy transition technologies, artificial intelligence applications in energy, digital transformation for resource optimization, the explosive growth in power demand driven by the artificial intelligence boom and hyperscale data centers (with natural gas providing reliable dispatchable power to data centers), and other infrastructure or industrial opportunities that complement the energy sector.
